topic: A man has been appearing in my parents wedding photos over the last year moving closer to my father each scan
title: A Man Has Been Appearing in My Parents Wedding Photos and Moving Closer to My Father Each Year | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a man in my parents wedding photos. Last year there was no man.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open photo album on a kitchen table showing a faded wedding photograph in plastic sleeves, dim warm dining room lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Their fortieth anniversary. We were sorting old albums for a slideshow.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of multiple photo albums stacked on a dining room table, scrapbooks open, an old slide projector on a side table, late afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I am scanning them. One by one.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand turning a thick photo album page, the plastic sleeves crinkling, sepia toned photographs visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Album three. Reception photo. A man at the back I did not recognize.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an eighties wedding reception photograph in a plastic sleeve, a long table of family members visible, a single unfamiliar figure at the back, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked my mother. She did not know him.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an elderly woman's hands flipping through a photo album on a kitchen counter, no face visible, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Checked album one. Same man at the ceremony. I had scanned that photo last year.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a kitchen counter with an open laptop showing a digital scan beside the open physical photo album, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled my backup from last June.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a portable external hard drive plugged into a laptop, a file backup interface visible on the screen, dim home office, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same album. Same page. No man.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of two side by side photo scans on a laptop screen, one with a figure circled in red, the other without, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Compared each scan. He has been moving forward across the photos.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a printed photo timeline laid out across a coffee table, a figure circled in increasing positions across multiple photographs, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: In the most recent scan he is standing next to my father at the altar.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a wedding altar photograph, two figures standing closely together at the front, one of them slightly out of focus, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My father has been dead eleven years.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a framed sepia portrait on a fireplace mantel showing a man in an eighties suit, dim ambient lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: In the next scan, the man will be closer than my father.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an unopened photo album on a desk beside a closed laptop, the album cover slightly raised as if waiting to be opened, vertical 9:16 framing
